title: Dockerized test failure remediation and cycle-03 fix-check closure
description: Resolved this session's Dockerized test blockers (backend unit crypto key-length failures and API backup verification auth-plugin failure), then completed cycle-03 static fix-check reporting and stale endpoint documentation reconciliation.

errors.error: Backend unit tests failed with ERR_CRYPTO_INVALID_KEYLEN in stored-value/encryption paths.
errors.cause: The backend unit test runner container did not have deterministic test secret values wired for encryption and JWT inputs.
errors.fix: Added explicit test env values for JWT_SECRET and a valid 64-hex ENCRYPTION_KEY under the backend unit test runner service.

errors.error: API observability backup test failed with backup trigger 500 due to dump authentication mismatch.
errors.cause: MySQL 8 default auth plugin was incompatible with the dump client path used in test backup flow.
errors.fix: Set test DB service command to use mysql_native_password plugin for test-stack compatibility.

errors.error: API spec contained stale endpoint/field contracts relative to implemented routes/controllers.
errors.cause: Contract rows drifted from current backend behavior across health, parking, carriers, delivery-zones, shipping templates, coupons, stored-value, logs, and admin settings/keys.
errors.fix: Updated stale method/path/query/body/response rows to match current implementation and removed outdated field names.

errors.error: Cycle-03 round-1 fix-check artifact was missing.
errors.cause: Static verification evidence had been gathered but not persisted as the requested round file.
errors.fix: Created cycle-03 round-1 fix-check report with per-finding status (H1/H2/M1/M2), evidence references, and doc-reconciliation outcome; duplicated to requested typo path for compatibility.

rootCause: Two issues combined in this session: (1) test-stack environment incompatibilities (secret initialization and DB auth plugin behavior), and (2) documentation/reporting drift after prior code hardening.
impact: Before these fixes, dockerized backend/API suites could fail despite valid business logic, and cycle-03 acceptance closure lacked a finalized round-1 artifact with fully aligned endpoint documentation.

validation.method: Dockerized suite execution plus static verification/document reconciliation in workspace.
